name: Chocolate Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup all-purpose flour or 2 tablespoons cornstarch
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine sugar and salt. Chop the semisweet chocolate and add with the milk; stir gradually into the dry mixture over medium heat until boiling.
2. Cook and stir until the mixture thickens and boils for 2 minutes longer.
3. Remove from heat. Stir small amounts of hot mixture into the yolks, then return to the hot mixture and cook for 2 more minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Add butter and vanilla; cool to room temperature. (To prevent a crust from forming, cover with clear plastic wrap or waxed paper directly on top, touching the surface of the hot pudding.)
5. Pour into the baked pastry shell.
6. Beat 3 eggs with 1/4 teaspoon cream of tartar and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla until soft peaks form. Gradually add 6 tablespoons sugar, beating until stiff peaks form and all sugar is dissolved.
7. Spread over the pie, sealing to the pastry. Bake in a moderate oven at 350°F for about 12 to 15 minutes, or until the meringue is golden.
8. Cool.
